title: Bacillus
description: A remake of the original Bacteria mod by TeNNoX with extra features for 1.21.x (and beyond).
body:
# This mod is a Work-In-Progress. **Bacillus** is a remake of the mod **[Bacteria](https://tennoxmods.blogspot.com/p/bacteria-mod.html)** by TeNNoX. Some textures used in the mod are from the **[Bacterium](https://modrinth.com/mod/bacterium)** mod by InEqualMeasure.
We offer versions on CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bacillus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bacillus)
Requires the [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) Forge version requires [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) Fabric version requires [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
## Destroyer Bacteria ![An isometric view of the purple destroyer bacteria.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d2befc3f9c73716159583fb0f0a17190212766.png) - Takes in a set of blocks above itself as a filter and spreads to those blocks, destroying them. ## Replacer Bacteria ![An isometric view of the red replacer bacteria.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db81915f2c5f256c71389286cf48bab450961135.png) - Takes in the block directly above it to replace blocks below it with the supplied block. - Blocks placed on top of the source block are used as a filter to only let the replacer bacteria target those blocks. **Both bacteria are activated using a redstone signal** **Note**: The block directly below the bacteria is implicitly added to the target filter. ## Compacted Must ![A green clump of goo; compacted must.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b530984f64d298c7a15e733feb2dda8b63e0fd45.png) - Used in crafting bacteria blocks and the jammer. ## Jammer ![A remote with a red and green wire sticking out of it; the bacteria jammer.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db3c357591fa397b3115d7680550d260882cd406.png) - Used for jamming and/or killing all bacteria in the world. - Use in main hand for jamming bacteria. - Use in off hand for killing bacteria.
